programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
16/26. Tha Daolag Bhreac is Seillean tuathal leis na rinn iad de thoinneamh. Daolag Bhreac and Seillean are dizzy after the amount of spinning they've done.
35/52. Tha AH-AH is MacÌomhair a' tòiseachadh cruinneachaidhean ach chan eil cùisean sìtheil. AH-AH and MacÌomhair start collections, but things aren't peaceful.
3/26. Ernest is tired of being spied on by his neighbour. To cure her of the habit, he decides to play a joke on her, starring Célestine and Boléro.
10/52. Tha Pip is Posy a' togail shadhbhaidhean ach chan eil iad idir rèidh le chèile. Pip and Posy are den-building, but they're not getting on with one another.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 31/52. Abney and Teal go fishing. Teal soon loses interest, but Abney finally catches something very interesting - a handbag!
11/26. Tusk is painting a portrait of Ping Wing. Well, he's trying to. Frustrated, he throws away his attempts.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 42/52. Abair gu bheil Bleideag iarratach 's Stella na manaidsear-sgìreil oirr'. Bleideag is very demanding when Stella becomes her community manager.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 43/52. Tha oidhche spà dol a bhith ann. A spa night is going to take place.
4/6. Calum Macdonald takes a look at some of the bonkers challenges attempted by the CBBC ALBA team, including some very smelly cheese tasting!
4/9. Thug bàs a mhàthair air Vito gu bhith trèanadh gu cruaidh gus àrd ìre bogsaidh a ruigsinn. Spurred on to train harder by his mother's death, Vito has got to a high level in boxing.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
3/6. The time has come, and Peter is ready to buy some Highland cows. Là na Fèille ann agus tha Pàdruig deiseil airson crodh Gàidhealach a cheannach.
7/12. Past stories covered include evidence of drug misuse escalating throughout the Highlands; and rising cancer levels among women in Caithness and Galloway.
7/8. Mìairi NicaGhobhain le taghadh de dh'òrain is bàrdach gaoil. Mary Smith explores the themes of love and loss through the Gaelic poetry and songs of women in Scotland.
5/8. Ramsay immerses himself in Durness's history, mainland Britain's most north-westerly community. Ramsay a'bogadh an eachdraidh Dhiùirnis, am baile is fhaide an iar-thuath air tìr-mòr.
6/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.
4/6. Erica visits her home island of Skye for a barn renovation, plus a look at a stately home near Elgin once connected to cashmere wool.
3/4. Mary Ann Kennedy presents a music show from Celtic Connections 2026, featuring RURA, Arthur, Ruairidh & Iain Cormack, Alice Macmillan, JP Cormier and ÉTÉ.
An sgeulachd mun deuchainn-smiùraidh. The story of the cervical cancer test.
28/30. The Hoosiers rock the Garden Stage on the final night of Belladrum. Contains scenes of flashing images.
1/2. Tha Catrìona NicNèill aig Farpais Chòmhlan Pìoba na Cruinne 2025. Carrie MacNeil presents Grade One performances from the 2025 World Pipe Band Championships.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
15/15. Tha Eilidh NicCarmaig a' coinneachadh ri Angus agus na ceithir cait aige. Eilidh Cormack meets Angus and his four cats.
9/52. Tha sìol bho chraobh gu math sònraicht' air tuiteam às na speuran. Ach de th' ann? Seed from a very special tree has fallen from the sky. But what is it?
1/21. Isabelle, Phoenix and Oona are on their way to meet Mossy. Tha Iseabail, Phoenix is Onna dol a choinneachadh Mosaidh.
2/21. Bernie has been washed out to sea on a bit of driftwood. Tha Bernie air a sguabadh a-mach gu muir air pìos fiodha, fhad 's a dh'fhan e ri Bernadette 'son clic.
7/15. Tha Sophie agus a caraidean a' bocadaich coltach ri muncaidh agus ròn. Sophie and her friends dance like a monkey and a seal.
15/104. Tha chabhag a th' air Bing cluich, ga fhàgail ann an staing tron a gheama. Bing's hurry to get a game started leaves him in a bit of a pickle later on.
16/104. Tha Bing a' dèanamh briosgaidean ach gun duine cluinntinn an ùineadair, tha iad a' losgadh. Bing ends up burning his biscuits when he fails to hear the oven timer.
16/26. Tha Daolag Bhreac is Seillean tuathal leis na rinn iad de thoinneamh. Daolag Bhreac and Seillean are dizzy after the amount of spinning they've done.
7/26. Greg finds Gutierrez, Roman's missing pet turtle. Then everyone tries the impossible - to keep the turtle from hibernating.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 49/52. The people of Grimsby believe the Twins are wise lifestyle gurus, able to predict what everyone wants before they know it themselves.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 50/52. Dave and his friends are given a lesson in responsibility when their school assigns them an animal each to look after overnight.
10/13. Tha stoirm a' tighinn - tha a h-uile seòrs' aimsir ann. An e Spioradan na Sìd' as coireach? There's a storm coming with all sorts of weather. Are the Weather Spirits to blame?
...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 42/52. Tha Troig trang a' dèanamh fàidhireachdan an-diugh 's e air misean teasairginn. Troig is busy foretelling futures when he is on a rescue mission.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach seachdainn le sgioba-naidheachd BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news from BBC ALBA.
2/9. Iain MacKinnon presents a mix of hymns, psalms and readings from Coats in Paisley.
8/8. Ramsay MacMahon takes a stroll on the beach with Ingrid Henderson. Tha Ramsay MacMahon a'gabhail cuairt air an tràigh cuide ri Ingrid NicEanraig.
6/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.
3/3. Anne Lundon explores rain's value to communities around the world. Tha Anne Lundon a' rannsachadh luach an uisge ann an coimhearsnachdan air feadh an t-saoghail.

programmes.show_name: Surfing: Marcachd an Tuinn/Riding the Wave
programmes.show_description: 1/2. Eachdraidh Surfadh air feadh an t-saoghail. The history of surfing across the world. Deals with adult themes.
3/4. Mary Ann Kennedy presents a music show from Celtic Connections 2026, featuring RURA, Arthur, Ruairidh & Iain Cormack, Alice Macmillan, JP Cormier and ÉTÉ.
